attachment.snippet:
1	# .agent-skills
2	
3	Local agent, skill, and plugin workspace for reusable AI workflows.
4	
5	This is the canonical local source for reusable agents and skills. The legacy
6	`/Users/steven/.agents` path is kept as a compatibility symlink only; new
7	configuration should point directly at `/Users/steven/.agent-skills`.
8	
9	This repository is a living working set. Prefer additive changes, staged outputs,
10	and changelogs over destructive cleanup. CSVs are treated as living tables: rows
11	may be added, removed, or corrected, but generation scripts should append a
12	changelog beside the CSV.
13	
14	## Layout
15	
16	- `agents/` - Markdown, TOML, YAML, CSV, and text agent/persona definitions.
17	- `skills/` - Skill directories and nested skill libraries.
18	- `deep-research/` - Research-oriented skill material.
19	- `scripts/` - Local inspection and catalog tooling for this workspace.
20	- `tmp-csv/` - Local staged CSV outputs, ignored by Git.
21	- `tmp-md/` - Local staged Markdown reports, ignored by Git.
22	- `tmp/` - Local scratch/history folder, ignored by Git.
23	
24	## Current Runtime Surface
25	
26	Last audited: 2026-07-13.
27	
28	- `agents/`: 108 non-hidden agent/config files.
29	- `skills/`: 92 top-level directories plus 1 top-level symlink.
30	- Direct/root-visible skills: 74 `SKILL.md` files within depth 2.
31	- Local expanded skills: 154 `SKILL.md` files within depth 3.
32	- Symlink-followed runtime-visible skills: 177 `SKILL.md` files.
33	
34	Claude and Codex should consume this tree directly:
35	
36	- `/Users/steven/.claude/agents -> /Users/steven/.agent-skills/agents`
37	- `/Users/steven/.claude/skills -> /Users/steven/.agent-skills/skills`
38	- `/Users/steven/.codex/agents -> /Users/steven/.agent-skills/agents`
39	- `/Users/steven/.codex/skills -> /Users/steven/.agent-skills/skills`
40	- `/Users/steven/.codex/superpowers -> /Users/steven/.agent-skills/skills/using-superpowers`
41	
42	`INDEX.md` is the broader generated overview. This README is the short entry
43	point for the repository.
44
